name: Apple IIgs (ROM 3)
comment: Apple IIgs ROM 3 (256KB / banks $FC-$FF) — the production enhanced ROM most IIgs machines shipped with. This image is the 'Tenspeed' late-1988/early-1989 ROM 3 variant (a full 256KB contiguous dump). Apple ROM images are NOT redistributed in this fork — fetch from the Asimov / Apple II Documentation Project mirror, then drop them here (main.rom + char.rom). NOTE: the standard ROM 3 also ships as two 128KB chip dumps (FC-FD 341-0728/0737 + FF-FE 341-0748/0749); those can be assembled into a 256KB FC/FD/FE/FF image instead. Selected in gssquared as 'Apple IIgs (ROM 3)' (rom_dir override = apple2gs3, platform stays PLATFORM_APPLE_IIGS).

parts.filename: Apple IIGS ROM 3 Tenspeed Late 1988 Early 1989.bin

roms.comment: IIgs Mega II video/character ROM — identical across IIgs ROM revisions. Same file as roms/apple2gs/char.rom.
